Interrupt Identity / FIFO Control

Absolute Address:
Base Offset:
0x8
Size:
0x4
Source:
uart_rf.rdl

Description

Read: Interrupt Identity Register (IIR) - identifies highest-priority pending interrupt. Write: FIFO Control Register (FCR) - controls FIFO operation (write-only).

Contents

Bits Identifier Access Reset Decoded Name
[31:8] reserved rw 0x0 -
[7:6] fifose r 0x0 FIFOSE
[5:4] reserved2 rw 0x0 -
[3:0] iid r 0x1 IID

Field Descriptions

fifose - FIFOSE

FIFOs Enabled status (IIR[7:6]). 00=disabled, 11=enabled.

iid - IID

Interrupt ID (IIR[3:0]): 0001=none, 0110=line status, 0100=data available, 1100=char timeout, 0010=THR empty, 0000=modem status, 0111=busy detect.
